title: Time Constant and Rise Time of a System
summary: This page defines the effective duration or time constant of an impulse response and shows that for a single-mode response h(t) = Ae^{\lambda t}u(t), the time constant is T_h = -1/\lambda. It then introduces subsection 2.6-3, relating rise time to time constant and concluding qualitatively that the rise time T_r equals T_h for a simplified rectangular impulse-response model.
